name: Punugulu

ingredients.name: 2 cups leftover idli or dosa batter

steps: Mix chopped onion, green chillies, curry leaves, rice flour and salt into the batter to make it thick.
Heat oil in a kadai on medium flame.
Drop small spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil.
Fry until golden brown and crisp on all sides.
Drain and serve hot with ginger chutney.
